name: blastwave-website
description: Static site for blastwave.space. Build: npm run build (output dist/). Deploy dist/ to Cloudflare Pages or nginx. Custom domain via public/CNAME.

scripts.prepare:assets: curl -L -o public/assets/bg-source.mp4 https://files.catbox.moe/zheel0.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/bg-source.mp4 -t 20 -vf scale=1280:-2 -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf 35 -b:v 0 -an public/assets/bg.webm && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/bg-source.mp4 -ss 00:00:01 -vframes 1 -vf scale=1280:-2 public/assets/bg-poster.webp && rm -f public/assets/bg-source.mp4
